testcase.name: tc15_FormRequiredFields

failure.message: FAIL [TC-15]: Too few expected fields found. Missing: [name, email, phone, mobile, message, resume, position, subject]. Form may have different field names — check input attributes above in TC-14

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: FAIL [TC-15]: Too few expected fields found. Missing: [name, email, phone, mobile, message, resume, position, subject].
